items.title: United States Air Taxi Market Analysis Report 2025-2033 by Propulsion Type, Aircraft Type, Passenger Capacity, States and Competitive Landscape
items.description: The United States Air Taxi Market is projected to reach $1.97 billion by 2033, growing from $0.4 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 19.44% from 2025 to 2033. Key drivers include advancements in electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) technology, urban congestion, and supportive government policies. items.title: United States Fire Sprinklers Market Analysis Report 2025-2033: Rising Fire Safety Awareness, Adoption of Advanced Technologies, and Stringent Safety Regulations Bolster Growth
items.description: The United States Fire Sprinklers Market is projected to grow from $3.74 billion in 2024 to $5.9 billion by 2033, driven by a CAGR of 5.18%. This growth is fueled by rising fire safety awareness, adoption of advanced technologies, and stringent safety regulations from bodies like the NFPA. The market benefits from mandatory insurance incentives and robust construction activity, particularly in urban areas. items.title: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Honeywell Intl, Lowers Price Target to $240
items.description: TD Cowen  analyst Gautam Khanna   maintains Honeywell Intl (NASDAQ:HON) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $250 to $240.
